implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: SearchRequest model with all specified fields and correct types
Project identifier validation (hyphen rejection, underscore requirement)
Domain tag validation with character-class allowlist

completion_promises.criterion_text: A SearchRequest Pydantic v2 model exists with fields project: str, payload_types: list[str] = [], domain_tags: list[str] = [], query: str | None = None, token_budget: int, include_superseded: bool = False
completion_promises.evidence: Created SearchRequest model in src/fleet_memory/retrieval/search_request.py with all required fields and correct types. Tests verify field types and defaults.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A project filter containing a hyphen is rejected; the error states that identifiers must use underscores
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_project_identifier validator using _PROJECT_PATTERN (^[a-z0-9_]+$) that rejects hyphens. Error message explicitly states 'must use underscores only (no hyphens)'. Test test_project_with_hyphen_rejected verifies rejection.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A payload type not in PAYLOAD_REGISTRY is rejected; the error names the unknown type. decision_log is a valid example of an unknown type
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_payload_types validator that checks against PAYLOAD_REGISTRY.keys(). Error message names the unknown type(s) and lists valid types. Test test_unknown_payload_type_rejected verifies rejection with decision_log example.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A domain tag containing injection/delimiter characters is rejected; the error states the tag is malformed. Tags are an exact-match facet
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_domain_tags validator using _DOMAIN_TAG_PATTERN (^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$) character-class allowlist. Error message states tag is 'malformed' and explains allowed characters. Tests verify rejection of quotes, operators, and SQL injection patterns.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A negative token_budget is rejected; the error indicates the budget must not be negative. token_budget == 0 is accepted
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_token_budget validator that rejects negative values with error 'must not be negative'. Zero values pass validation. Tests verify both negative rejection and zero acceptance.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A request with neither a query nor any filter is rejected; the error indicates a query or filter is required (ASSUM-008, low confidence)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented validate_query_or_filter_required model validator that requires either query or at least one filter (payload_types or domain_tags). Error message states 'A query or at least one filter is required'. Test test_request_with_neither_query_nor_filter_rejected verifies rejection.

completion_promises.criterion_text: An empty payload_types list means 'all registered types' (not 'none')
completion_promises.evidence: Empty payload_types list passes validation (defaults to []). Semantic interpretation documented in code comments as happening in assembly, not validation. Test test_empty_payload_types_means_all verifies empty list is accepted.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check on src/fleet_memory/retrieval/ - all checks passed. Fixed initial linting issues (unused import, line too long) and verified clean pass.
